title: Sol Foundation Established by Dr. Garry Nolan and Peter Skafish
detail: Stanford immunologist Dr. Garry Nolan and anthropologist Peter Skafish co-found the Sol Foundation, a think tank dedicated to serious academic and policy research on UAP. The foundation's first symposium is held in November 2023 at Stanford University, featuring David Grusch, Luis Elizondo, retired Army Colonel Karl Nell, and other credentialed researchers. The event marks a significant step in legitimizing UAP study within mainstream academia.
